task: READ-ONLY final review of the Apple-like two-layer Quickshell content transition after continuity fixes. Focus specifically on the previous blocker: repeated same-mode events and rapid mode changes must not snap opacity/offset. Inspect StatusData beginCenterTransition deduplication and Bar.qml capture of current source/target/residual visual state. Also check ordinary source/destination coexistence, equal-height behavior, cross-monitor mapping, QML validity, and whether residual mode logic can incorrectly keep/hide a layer. Do not edit. Report blockers/medium issues with exact lines, or CLEAN.

criteria.must: Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable
Return concrete findings with file paths and severity when applicable

criteriaSatisfied.evidence: Two blockers reported with exact StatusData.qml and Bar.qml line ranges, plus verified behavior for coexistence, equal-height transitions, and cross-monitor mapping.

commandsRun.command: git status --short && git diff --stat && git diff --cached --stat && git log -5 --oneline
commandsRun.summary: Inspected working-tree and staged change state.

commandsRun.command: nl -ba StatusData.qml and nl -ba Bar.qml over transition-related ranges
commandsRun.summary: Inspected exact transition implementation with line numbers.

commandsRun.command: git diff and git diff --cached for StatusData.qml and Bar.qml
commandsRun.summary: Reviewed staged implementation and subsequent continuity fixes.

commandsRun.command: Component visibility/size grep and transition-call-site grep
commandsRun.summary: Checked layer rendering assumptions, implicit heights, and repeated event call sites.

validationOutput: Same-mode deduplication is correct for ordinary volume, brightness, media, launcher, and update events.
Wi-Fi and Bluetooth repeated show calls incorrectly emit a transition to workspaces.
Only one residual layer is retained, so four-mode rapid interruption can snap another nonzero layer.
No obvious QML syntax defect found by manual inspection; runtime load not performed.
residualRisks: Runtime QML loading and animation timing were not exercised.
No automated transition tests cover repeated selector show calls or four-mode interruption sequences.
childReport.diffSummary: Read-only review; no files edited. Reviewed existing StatusData.qml and Bar.qml transition changes.
reviewFindings: blocker: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/StatusData.qml:695-726 and 805-831 - repeated Wi-Fi/Bluetooth show calls generate a workspace transition and then restore state without a matching visual transition.

blocker: home_manager/hyprland/quickshell/top-bar/Bar.qml:299-321 - only one of multiple still-visible excluded layers is retained during rapid interruption, causing the other to snap to zero opacity.
childReport.manualNotes: Ordinary two-mode coexistence, equal-height behavior, and cross-monitor localization are otherwise coherent.
